channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover hidden gut-brain circuit that triggers protein cravings
item.description: When the body runs low on protein, the gut sends powerful signals to the brain that reshape cravings and push animals to seek essential amino acids in...

item.title: DNA solves 250-year-old mystery of the Seychellesâ lost crocodiles
item.description: Scientists have solved the mystery of the Seychellesâ vanished crocodiles using DNA from historic museum specimens. The reptiles were not a unique spe...

item.title: A safer, cheaper alternative to LASIK without lasers or surgery
item.description: Scientists are developing a method using mild electrical pulses to reshape the eye, offering a non-invasive alternative to LASIK.

item.title: A century-old piano mystery has been solved
item.description: After over 100 years of debate, researchers have determined whether a pianist's touch can alter a piano note's tone color.
